_comment: Canvas access boundary — worked example. No AI tool touches Canvas; canvas_run.py is a plain script the instructor runs. Copy to .claude/settings.json in your course repo, with hooks/block_canvas.py alongside. Deny rules are the declarative layer; the hook is the catch-all (it matches command text the globs miss, e.g. a bare `python` invocation). See docs/canvas-access-boundary.md.
